hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then out=$(cd /home/user/mindcraft-mod/java-edition && ./gradlew compileJava --quiet --daemon 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then if echo "$out" | grep -q 'Plugin.*was not found\|Could not resolve\|Connection refused'; then echo "[compile-check] Gradle unavailable (network); skipping."; else echo "[compile-check] ERRORS:"; echo "$out" | grep -E 'error:|warning:|.java:[0-9]+' | head -20; fi; else echo "[compile-check] OK"; fi; fi
